sourceMovie.title: Paranormal Activity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Paranormal Activity works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Paranormal Activity clicked for you, It Follows (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Paranormal Activity?
faq.answer: Try It Follows, Barbarian, Mirrors—each shares DNA with Paranormal Activity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Paranormal Activity?
faq.answer: Paranormal Activity (2007) is best described as Horror, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Paranormal Activity part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Paranormal Activity Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
